name: GIGABYTE Z790 AERO G ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
